message.content:
The user wants to add categories or tags functionality to their todo list application. 

Current application context:
- Next.js 16 todo app with TypeScript and Tailwind CSS
- SQLite database with Prisma ORM
- Current Todo model has: id, title, description, completed, priority, dueDate, createdAt, updatedAt
- No categories or tags currently exist

User request: "Add categories to todos"

Please:
1. Gather and clarify requirements for this feature
2. Create a PRD or delegate to appropriate workflow
3. Break down into user stories with acceptance criteria
4. Coordinate with the appropriate agents (system-architect for design review, etc.)

This work will potentially be tracked in Azure DevOps (project: Todo-App Tadeu Marques), but I need to ask the user first before creating work items there.
